title: Not Enough Bush
description: 300+ Unique Bush Types: From common garden varieties to exotic and rare species, explore a vast selection of bushes that will bring new life to your Worlds.
body:
300+ Unique Bush Types: From common garden varieties to exotic and rare species, explore a vast selection of bushes that will bring new life to your environment.

Custom Textures and Models: Each bush is meticulously designed with high-quality textures and detailed models to provide a realistic and immersive experience.

Biomes Integration: Bushes are naturally integrated into various biomes, ensuring seamless blending with the existing flora.

Interactive Bushes: Some bushes come with special interactions, such as berries to harvest, flowers to pick, or leaves that rustle in the wind.

Decorative and Functional: Use bushes for purely aesthetic purposes or as functional elements like natural barriers or wildlife habitats.

Installation

Place the file in your game’s mods folder.
Launch the game and enjoy the new variety of bushes in your world!
Compatibility

Compatible with most other landscaping and flora mods.
Tested and optimized for performance, ensuring smooth gameplay even with the extensive addition of new bush types.
Feedback and Support

We value your feedback! If you encounter any issues or have suggestions for new bush types, please reach out to us through Discord. Join our community on [Discord](https://discord.gg/EmEdTaUh3S) to share your creations and see what others are doing with "Not Enough Bushing."
